purpose: Pre-fit numerical scale-reach input; this is not a fitted Z peak, calibration correction, mH, or mu result.

control_selection.common: OSSF pair supplied by dilep ntuplizer; 70<mll<110 GeV, nPV>0, |dz1-dz2|<0.1 cm, both relIso03<0.15.
control_selection.mumu: finalState=0, one of the single/double/triple-muon trigger bits 0,1,2,3,8, both medium-ID and PF-or-global muons.
control_selection.ee: finalState=1, one of electron trigger bits 4,5, both MVA-WP90 electrons.

method: RMS/sqrt(N) over the broad fit domain is a conservative statistical floor proxy; the Phase 3 peak-fit covariance supersedes it.

reference_scaled_investigation_threshold.meaning: Cross-check thresholds only, scaled from HIG-16-041 total uncertainty; they are not assigned nuisance sizes.
